message:
test(search): add 22 Search V3 conformance tests (br-2tnl.7.3)

Covers result shape, engine routing/degradation, scope enforcement,
product search, and filter parity (importance, thread, ack, time range,
combined facets, recency ranking, limit, project isolation, engine
alias parsing, capability flags, rollout surface overrides).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
